details.IncidentDetail: "[14] [Notification] [CHP]-SDPD HAS TC ON THEIR WAY --VEH VS BRIDGE ENTERANCE // SDPD INC # 42239 // 16700 W BERNARDO DR-- [Shared]"

"[11] RP CANT EXIT HE IS IN HOV / AS SOON AS HE CAN HE WILL EXIT FOR CHP"
"[3] RP IN A HOND ACC / TOYT CAM HIT HIM"

"[5] THERE IS SKID MARKS OF THE ROAD THAT LEAD TO THAT VEH AND THERE IS MAJOR DMG TO IT"
"[2] SDGandE 97 AT LIGHT POLE AND ADV THE SV IS PARKED IFO OF THAT 1020"
